cards.name: Full Stack Bootcamp
cards.description: Add Blue Skill Token (Software) to a Junior.

cards.name: QA Certification
cards.description: Add Green Skill Token (QA) to a Junior.

cards.name: Sales Seminar
cards.description: Add 1 XP Token to a Specialist (QA or Sales).

cards.name: Leadership Masterclass
cards.description: Add Gold Rank Badge to a Junior Developer (becomes Tier 2 Lead).

cards.name: Agile Workshop
cards.description: Add Gold Rank Badge to a PM (becomes Agile/Senior PM).

cards.name: Corporate Raider
cards.description: Poach target for 1.5x Cost AND bypass HR Manager.

cards.name: Hit Piece
cards.description: Add Scandal Token to target opponent's Maintenance product.

cards.name: Non-Compete Suit
cards.description: Hostile Buyout. Pay Investor $5 to force return of your Equity.

cards.name: Workaholic
cards.description: Buff Own: +2 Output, +$2 Salary. Attach to your talent.

cards.name: Clean Coder
cards.description: Buff Own: This unit never generates Bugs. Attach to your talent.

cards.name: Visionary
cards.description: Buff Own: Counts as Lead for any Tier. Attach to your talent.

cards.name: Toxic Personality
cards.description: Debuff Enemy: -1 Team Output. Attach to opponent's talent.

cards.name: Burnout
cards.description: Debuff Enemy: 0 Output. Attach to opponent's talent.

cards.name: Flight Risk
cards.description: Debuff Enemy: Poach Cost is 1x Base. Attach to opponent's talent.

cards.name: TechCrunch Feature
cards.description: Add Hype Token to your Maintenance product.

cards.name: Design Sprint
cards.description: Draw 5 Product cards, keep 1, discard rest to Open Idea Pool.

cards.name: Cease & Desist
cards.description: Reaction: Cancel an opponent's Warfare card played against you.
